blocks.text: Match preview: India Women U19 face Sri Lanka Women U19 in 1st unofficial T20 (T20) on Mon, 22 Jun, 2026, 1:00 pm at MA Chidambaram Stadium Chennai. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: India Women U19 vs Sri Lanka Women U19
Sri Lanka Women U19 tour of India 2026

blocks.text: Traditional spin-friendly track; low-scoring Tests, balanced in limited overs.
Variable conditions · High 33°C / Low 26°C · Rain: 3.4 mm · Wind: up to 17 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
